---
title: "\'Classification of the Aryan Languages\'"
---

## \'Classification of the Aryan Languages\'

**Author:** Arthur John Butler
**Date:** 1874
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (April 1874) 4-6.

### Notes

This answer to one of the Spider questions is attributed to Butler because it is apparently referred to in a letter to him from CMY.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
